the potential wilderness area designated by section 1103(a).1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Force and effect
children.label: b Force and effect
children.text: The maps and boundary descriptions filed under subsection (a) shall have the same force and effect as if included in this subtitle, except that the Secretary may correct any minor errors in the maps and boundary descriptions.

children.heading: Availability of map and boundary description
children.label: c Availability of map and boundary description
children.text: The maps and boundary descriptions filed under subsection (a) shall be on file and available for public inspection in the Office of the Chief of the Forest Service.

children.heading: Conflict
children.label: d Conflict
children.text: In the case of a conflict between a map filed under subsection (a) and the acreage of the applicable areas specified in this subtitle, the map shall control.
